variants: At Fable Isle Productions, Ernesto Llerena utilizes his creativity to breathe life into innovative projects. Originally from Beaconlight Flats, he currently resides in Ravenpine Hall, where he continues to develop his artistic vision. Known for his invention of the Webbed Light Filter, Ernesto has made a significant impact in his field. His remarkable contributions have earned him the prestigious Elderwood Emblem, marking a high point in his career. Throughout his journey, Ernesto has remained deeply connected to his roots in Beaconlight Flats.
